summary: Iteration 38 - Verification of PDF Export, Onboarding Progress Tracker, Coaching Loop features. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Owner sees Onboarding Tracker widget with 4 crews showing progress bars (67%, 83%, 83%, 83%) and 6 milestone badges per crew. AM Report widget with Export PDF button works - download triggers successfully and produces valid PDF. Coaching Loop widget renders with 0 offenders and shows empty state message 'No repeat offenders detected in the last 180 days.'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 38 verified all requested features: 1) PDF Export at /api/exports/am-report-pdf returns valid PDF with proper headers (tested with days=90 default and days=180), 2) Onboarding Progress at /api/onboarding/progress returns crews with 6 milestones (first_submission, first_review, training_started, training_completed, equipment_check, five_submissions), 3) Coaching Loop at /api/coaching/loop-report returns report and summary (0 offenders currently - crews need 2+ flagged issues to appear), 4) Coaching assign/complete endpoints work correctly. Frontend widgets all render correctly: widget-onboarding-tracker shows 4 crews with progress bars and milestone badges, widget-coaching-loop shows empty state with 0 offenders, widget-am-report has Export PDF button that triggers download.

verified_features.backend_auth: POST /api/auth/login returns token for owner credentials
verified_features.backend_pdf_export_default: GET /api/exports/am-report-pdf returns 200 with content-type application/pdf and valid PDF bytes
verified_features.backend_pdf_export_content_disposition: PDF has Content-Disposition header with attachment and filename
verified_features.backend_pdf_export_auth_required: PDF export requires authentication (401/403 without token)
verified_features.backend_pdf_export_pm_access: PM (management role) can access PDF export
verified_features.backend_onboarding_structure: Each crew has crew_label, leader_name, division, milestones, completed_count, total_milestones, progress_pct
verified_features.backend_coaching_loop_report: GET /api/coaching/loop-report?division=all returns report array and summary object with total_offenders, open_loops, in_progress, closed_loops
verified_features.backend_coaching_assign: POST /api/coaching/assign creates coaching action with crew_code, issue_tags, notes and returns id
verified_features.frontend_onboarding_tracker_widget: Owner sees widget-onboarding-tracker with 4 crew progress bars (67%, 83%, 83%, 83%) and 6 milestone badges per crew
verified_features.frontend_coaching_loop_widget: Owner sees widget-coaching-loop with 0 offenders and empty state message
verified_features.frontend_am_report_widget: Owner sees widget-am-report with Client Quality Report table
verified_features.frontend_export_pdf_button: Export PDF button (data-testid='am-export-pdf-btn') visible and triggers download
verified_features.frontend_pdf_download_works: Clicking Export PDF downloads SarverLandscape_ClientReport.pdf (valid PDF starting with %PDF-1.3)

notes.coaching_loop_widget: The widget-coaching-loop now always renders when data is loaded (even with 0 offenders). It shows the summary stats (0 Repeat Offenders, 0 Open Loops, 0 In Progress, 0 Closed) and displays the empty state message 'No repeat offenders detected in the last 180 days.'
notes.pdf_export: PDF export includes per-submission detail grouped by property with clickable photo links, field reports, GPS data, reviews, and equipment logs. Demo data has empty photo_urls so there may be 0 URI links in the PDF.
